scripts.paper:html: cd paper && quarto render california-wealth-tax-ssrn-draft.qmd --to html --output index.html --output-dir ../public/papers/web
scripts.paper:pdf: cd paper && quarto render california-wealth-tax-ssrn-draft.qmd --to pdf --output california-wealth-tax-ssrn-draft.pdf --output-dir ../public/papers
scripts.paper:render: npm run paper:html && npm run paper:pdf
